options.label: A
options.text: The speed of an object compared to a fixed point, like the ground

options.label: B
options.text: The speed of one object measured relative to another moving object

options.label: C
options.text: The maximum speed an object can travel

options.label: D
options.text: The speed that changes over time

explanation: Relative speed is how fast one moving object appears to move compared to another moving object. For example, if two cars are driving towards each other, their relative speed depends on both their individual speeds.
